title: NoChat
description: Disables the chat for full immersion. Includes a secret key combo (Shift + X + R + F7) to re-enable it locally on your client — perfect for RP servers and immersive modpacks.
body:
# **NoChat**

Keep your world immersive, silence the chat completely.

Tired of chat messages breaking your immersion during gameplay or roleplay? SilentChat removes the Minecraft chat window entirely, keeping your screen clean and focused on the world around you.

But there’s a secret: a hidden key combo (Shift + X + R + F7) that lets you quietly re-enable the chat only on your client. Nobody else will see it, it’s your private toggle to stay connected when needed.

---

### Features

- Completely hides the in-game chat for total immersion
- Secret key combo (Shift + X + R + F7) to re-enable chat locally
- Toggle works client-side only, others stay chat-free
- Perfect for roleplay servers, cinematic recordings, or immersive modpacks
- Lightweight and zero performance impact

---

### Compatibility

- Works on any modpack or server, no setup required
- Fully client-side, safe to use anywhere
- Compatible with most UI and HUD mods

---

### Made for Modpacks

Built for immersive experiences.
Whether you’re creating a story-driven world, a survival pack, or an RP server, NoChat helps keep the focus where it belongs, on the gameplay, not the text.

---

### Secret Mode

Press Shift + X + R + F7 to bring the chat back, only you will see it.
Press the same combo again to hide it.
No menus. No configs. Just a simple, hidden toggle for those who know the code.

---

### Feedback & Suggestions

Got ideas or feature requests? Found a mod you’d like NoChat to work better with?
Leave a comment, your feedback helps shape future updates.

---
